title: Lab profile
description: Schema for policy/lab_profiles/<profile_id>.v0.1.yaml (YAML loaded as JSON-compatible object).

benchmark_pack_path.description: Path to benchmark pack YAML relative to policy root

security_suite_path.description: Path to security attack suite YAML relative to policy root

safety_claims_path.description: Path to safety case claims YAML relative to policy root

coordination_study_spec_path.description: Path to coordination study spec YAML relative to policy root

extension_packages.description: Package names to import so their entry_points run
